speaker: speaker1
text: Good afternoon , welcome to IBA . How can I be of service ?

speaker: speaker2
text: I'd like to talk to somebody about the Group Account Deposit Service .

speaker: speaker1
text: This refers to the deposit business offered to the level 1 account of group companies .

speaker: speaker2
text: What is it used for ? I mean , why bother to get this special account ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Group companies can use this to make their arrangement of funds flexible , when dealing with their subsidiaries .

speaker: speaker2
text: I see , so this can really cut down on time and centralise management . Interesting ...
